text: Deploy is green. Please do not touch prod on a Friday, I am begging you.
does anyone actually know what "synergy" means
found a TODO comment from 2019 that just says "fix this later"
the tests are flaky again, merging anyway, wish me luck
I refactored the auth module, please don't ask me to explain it
who added a new microservice to talk to the OTHER microservice
on-call was quiet all night for once, small miracles

messages.text: hey uh, is it normal for the deploy pipeline to be stuck at 97% for 20 minutes
that's normal, don't worry about it
ok it just hit 100% and now it says "rolling back"
that's also normal, don't worry about it
I am someone. I am handling it right now.
guys we just crossed 3 users. THREE. I am genuinely worried about our ability to scale here
there is no way our ten API servers can handle a load like this, we need to move to Kubernetes immediately
oh I read about Kubernetes once! it's the one with the little wheel logo right
great, love the energy, let's move forward ASAP
reading the cost report and this word keeps popping up. "Lambdas." who authorized livestock in the server room
not literal sheep, sir. AWS Lambda is serverless compute, it runs code without provisioning any servers
"serverless." right, the hardware just teleports in from a cloud dimension
they're event-driven functions, a trigger fires, the code runs for a moment, then it shuts off. we only pay for that instant
invisible creatures doing tasks and then dying. that's a liability nightmare, do we have animal control for the API
it's not biological sir, it just saves us from paying for an idle VM 24/7
I don't care how efficient the sheep are, get rid of them. real, God-fearing EC2 instances only
...yes sir. starting the migration to EC2 now
